list.name: Changes
list.comment:
fix: remove unused files and cleanup project structure
- Remove obsolete authentication schemas, actions, and services no longer in use. - Delete redundant shared components and UI elements. - Remove `.idea` configuration files and unused SVG files. - Cleanup Tailwind, ESLint, and related configuration files. - Reduce clutter by eliminating dead code and unnecessary exports.

task.summary: Default task

feat: establish project architecture and initial structure
- Remove default Next.js setup and replace with custom structure based on Feature Slice Design. - Setup clear separation between client, admin, and backend layers. - Add Tailwind CSS for styling and integrate `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss`. - Introduce path aliases for improved imports (`tsconfig.json`). - Create foundational folders for `features`, `shared`, and `server`. - Add initial dummy pages for both client and admin areas. - Include project-specific organization guidelines in `README.md`.

chore: add JetBrains IDE config files to version control
- Include `.idea` folder configuration files for project-level settings, module structure, TypeScript, Prettier, and ShadcnHelper plugin.

chore: add JetBrains IDE config files to version control
- Include `.idea` folder configuration files for project-level settings, module structure, TypeScript, Prettier, and ShadcnHelper plugin.

chore: add JetBrains IDE config files to version control
- Include `.idea` folder configuration files for project-level settings, module structure, TypeScript, Prettier, and ShadcnHelper plugin.

chore: reformat JSON files for consistent indentation
- Adjust `.prettierrc` and `package.json` to use uniform formatting with proper indentation for better readability.

feat: enhance layout structure for admin and client areas
- Add responsive styling (`size-full min-h-screen`) to admin and client root layouts. - Update admin dashboard layout to include sidebar and header for improved structure.
feat: implement OTP-based account verification and update user Prisma model
feat: add mailer library
feat: add mailer library
feat: add mailer library
feat: add mailer library

feat: add reusable UI components and routing constants
- Introduce common UI components: `Card`, `Field`, `Input`, `InputOTP`, `Label`, and `Separator` for structured and consistent UI design. - Add `LoginForm`, `RegisterForm`, and `VerifyForm` for authentication pages. - Extend `Routing` constants for dashboard-related routes. - Update admin authentication layout with centered alignment.

feat: integrate Prisma ORM and database setup
- Add Prisma configuration files and schema for PostgreSQL integration. - Implement initial database migrations to create `User` and `Post` tables with relationships. - Add database-related npm scripts: `db:generate`, `db:migrate`, `db:seed`, and `db:studio`. - Include necessary dependencies: `@prisma/client`, `prisma`, and `pg`. - Update `.idea` configuration files to include database run configurations.

feat: integrate Prisma ORM and database setup
- Add Prisma configuration files and schema for PostgreSQL integration. - Implement initial database migrations to create `User` and `Post` tables with relationships. - Add database-related npm scripts: `db:generate`, `db:migrate`, `db:seed`, and `db:studio`. - Include necessary dependencies: `@prisma/client`, `prisma`, and `pg`. - Update `.idea` configuration files to include database run configurations.

feat: refactor user model and add authentication features
- Replace `User` and `Post` tables with a new `users` table using a UUID-based `id` and updated fields. - Add Zod schemas (`LoginSchema`, `RegisterSchema`, `VerifySchema`) for auth validation. - Introduce reusable validation messages for consistent input error handling. - Add auth actions: `loginAction`, `registerAction`, `verifyAction`. - Rename and refactor `Routing` constants to `RoutingConstant`. - Update related components (`LoginForm`, `RegisterForm`) to use new constants and validation schemas. - Add `zod` dependency for schema validation.

feat: modularize authentication feature and shared components
- Restructure auth-related components under `features/auth`. - Migrate shared UI elements to `shared/ui`. - Decouple Zod schemas and actions; remove redundant auth-related schemas and actions. - Update imports to use new modular directory structure. - Refactor `LoginForm` and `RegisterForm` to integrate `useActionState` for improved state handling. - Update path aliases in `components.json` for consistency with the new structure.

feat: add session management and enhance authentication flow
- Add `Session` model with migrations, including unique token and foreign key reference to `User`. - Implement session services (`setSession`, `deleteSession`, `generateSessionMetadata`) for token-based authentication. - Update `User` model to include sessions as a relation. - Add password hashing and verification utilities using `bcrypt`. - Introduce shared form validation utility with Zod for consistent input validation.

feat: improve registration flow with session handling and validation updates
- Update `registerAction` to include session creation via `setSession` after user registration. - Replace cookie management with session service for storing session tokens. - Refactor form validation error handling for improved consistency. - Update `FormState` type to align `form` error field handling.

fix: remove unused files and cleanup project structure
- Remove obsolete authentication schemas, actions, and services no longer in use. - Delete redundant shared components and UI elements. - Remove `.idea` configuration files and unused SVG files. - Cleanup Tailwind, ESLint, and related configuration files. - Reduce clutter by eliminating dead code and unnecessary exports.

MESSAGE.value:
feat: establish project architecture and initial structure
- Remove default Next.js setup and replace with custom structure based on Feature Slice Design. - Setup clear separation between client, admin, and backend layers. - Add Tailwind CSS for styling and integrate `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss`. - Introduce path aliases for improved imports (`tsconfig.json`). - Create foundational folders for `features`, `shared`, and `server`. - Add initial dummy pages for both client and admin areas. - Include project-specific organization guidelines in `README.md`.

chore: add JetBrains IDE config files to version control
- Include `.idea` folder configuration files for project-level settings, module structure, TypeScript, Prettier, and ShadcnHelper plugin.

chore: reformat JSON files for consistent indentation
- Adjust `.prettierrc` and `package.json` to use uniform formatting with proper indentation for better readability.

feat: enhance layout structure for admin and client areas
- Add responsive styling (`size-full min-h-screen`) to admin and client root layouts. - Update admin dashboard layout to include sidebar and header for improved structure.
feat: implement OTP-based account verification and update user Prisma model

feat: add reusable UI components and routing constants
- Introduce common UI components: `Card`, `Field`, `Input`, `InputOTP`, `Label`, and `Separator` for structured and consistent UI design. - Add `LoginForm`, `RegisterForm`, and `VerifyForm` for authentication pages. - Extend `Routing` constants for dashboard-related routes. - Update admin authentication layout with centered alignment.

feat: integrate Prisma ORM and database setup
- Add Prisma configuration files and schema for PostgreSQL integration. - Implement initial database migrations to create `User` and `Post` tables with relationships. - Add database-related npm scripts: `db:generate`, `db:migrate`, `db:seed`, and `db:studio`. - Include necessary dependencies: `@prisma/client`, `prisma`, and `pg`. - Update `.idea` configuration files to include database run configurations.

feat: refactor user model and add authentication features
- Replace `User` and `Post` tables with a new `users` table using a UUID-based `id` and updated fields. - Add Zod schemas (`LoginSchema`, `RegisterSchema`, `VerifySchema`) for auth validation. - Introduce reusable validation messages for consistent input error handling. - Add auth actions: `loginAction`, `registerAction`, `verifyAction`. - Rename and refactor `Routing` constants to `RoutingConstant`. - Update related components (`LoginForm`, `RegisterForm`) to use new constants and validation schemas. - Add `zod` dependency for schema validation.

feat: modularize authentication feature and shared components
- Restructure auth-related components under `features/auth`. - Migrate shared UI elements to `shared/ui`. - Decouple Zod schemas and actions; remove redundant auth-related schemas and actions. - Update imports to use new modular directory structure. - Refactor `LoginForm` and `RegisterForm` to integrate `useActionState` for improved state handling. - Update path aliases in `components.json` for consistency with the new structure.

feat: add session management and enhance authentication flow
- Add `Session` model with migrations, including unique token and foreign key reference to `User`. - Implement session services (`setSession`, `deleteSession`, `generateSessionMetadata`) for token-based authentication. - Update `User` model to include sessions as a relation. - Add password hashing and verification utilities using `bcrypt`. - Introduce shared form validation utility with Zod for consistent input validation.

feat: improve registration flow with session handling and validation updates
- Update `registerAction` to include session creation via `setSession` after user registration. - Replace cookie management with session service for storing session tokens. - Refactor form validation error handling for improved consistency. - Update `FormState` type to align `form` error field handling.

fix: remove unused files and cleanup project structure
- Remove obsolete authentication schemas, actions, and services no longer in use. - Delete redundant shared components and UI elements. - Remove `.idea` configuration files and unused SVG files. - Cleanup Tailwind, ESLint, and related configuration files. - Reduce clutter by eliminating dead code and unnecessary exports.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
fix: remove unused files and cleanup project structure
- Remove obsolete authentication schemas, actions, and services no longer in use. - Delete redundant shared components and UI elements. - Remove `.idea` configuration files and unused SVG files. - Cleanup Tailwind, ESLint, and related configuration files. - Reduce clutter by eliminating dead code and unnecessary exports.
